# Getting Started with AEO

> A beginner's guide to Answer Engine Optimization

Answer Engine Optimization is becoming increasingly important as AI-powered
systems become the primary way people discover and consume information.

## What You Need

- A Jekyll site
- The jekyll-aeo gem
- A basic understanding of Markdown

## Next Steps

Read our [FAQ](/faq/) for common questions.

---

---
title: Structured Data Guide
url: /blog/structured-data-guide/
canonical: https://example.com/blog/structured-data-guide/

author: Manuel Gruber
date: 2025-02-20
last_modified: 2025-02-20
---
# Structured Data Guide

> How to use JSON-LD structured data with jekyll-aeo

This guide explains how structured data works with jekyll-aeo.

## Supported Schema Types

jekyll-aeo supports six JSON-LD schema types that are automatically
generated based on your page content and front matter.

---

---
title: Code Examples
url: /code-examples/
canonical: https://example.com/code-examples/
description: Testing content stripping with various code and Liquid constructs
last_modified: 2026-03-14
---
> Testing content stripping with various code and Liquid constructs

# Code Examples

## Fenced Code Block

```python
def hello():
    print("Hello, World!")
    # This should be preserved exactly
```

## Liquid Tags in Content

This content between if/endif should be preserved.

## Raw Block

These Liquid-like tags {{ should_not_be_stripped }} are protected.

## Indented Code Block

    def indented_example():
        return "This should be protected with protect_indented_code: true"

## Kramdown Attributes

A paragraph with an attribute.

Regular paragraph after kramdown IAL.

> Common questions about Answer Engine Optimization

## Common Questions

Find answers to common questions about AEO below.

---
title: How to Install jekyll-aeo
url: /howto/
canonical: https://example.com/howto/
description: Step-by-step guide to adding AEO to your Jekyll site
last_modified: 2026-03-14
---
# How to Install jekyll-aeo

> Step-by-step guide to adding AEO to your Jekyll site

## Installation Steps

Follow these steps to get started.

## Step 1: Add the gem

Add the following to your `Gemfile`:

```ruby
gem "jekyll-aeo"
```

## Step 2: Install dependencies

Run `bundle install`.

## Step 3: Configure

Add settings to `_config.yml`.

## Step 4: Build

Run `jekyll build` and verify the output.

---

---
title: Example.com
url: /
canonical: https://example.com/
description: A test site for the jekyll-aeo gem — exercises all features
last_modified: 2026-03-14
---
# Example.com

> A test site for the jekyll-aeo gem — exercises all features

Welcome to Example.com. This site exercises every feature of the jekyll-aeo gem.

## Features Under Test

- Markdown page generation
- llms.txt and llms-full.txt
- Link tag injection
- JSON-LD schemas (FAQPage, HowTo, BreadcrumbList, Organization, Speakable, Article)
- robots.txt generation
- domain-profile.json
- URL map generation
